videos.title: Scientists Confirmed Uranus Isn't an Ice Giant After All
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: New planetary data just confirmed that Uranus is not actually the frozen ice giant astronomers always thought it was. videos.title: Moving Piece of Ancient Earth Just Found Under the U.S.
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Scientists have discovered something extraordinary deep beneath the United States: a massive fragment of ancient Earth that appears to be moving far below the surface. videos.title: The Latest Titanic Wreck Footage Has Scientists Concerned
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
More than a century after the Titanic sank, newly released footage from the wreck site is revealing a disturbing new look at the world's most famous shipwreck.

videos.title: America’s Largest River Just Revealed a Sea Monster
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: A team of geologists was mapping terrain in Mississippi when they saw something strange sticking out of the ground. They were not looking for fossils. videos.title: AI Unlocked Hundreds of New Nazca Geoglyphs With Surprise Meanings
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Researchers recently deployed advanced AI and drone mapping to uncover hundreds of previously hidden Nazca Lines in the Peruvian desert.
